caption: A man wearing a red traditional cap, glasses, and a light-colored garment speaks toward the camera. He is positioned in the foreground, while two other men stand behind him; one wears a striped garment and the other wears a green outfit and holds a phone to his ear. The background appears to be an outdoor or semi-outdoor urban setting with a building and some greenery visible. A logo is present in the top-left corner of each frame. On-screen text overlays the bottom of the scene, with a purple bar containing the words "PLUS POLITICS" and a white bar featuring the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a thinner bar displays "WATCH ONLINE" on the left and the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" on the right. Across the frames, the man in the foreground continues speaking, with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth position.
